series_metadata.series_title: CADD Mapping Construction Project Design Records
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all records and reports compiled during the course of designing a construction project. This series includes, but is not limited to: Project proposal notes, Correspondence, Geotechnical engineering reports, Construction plans, Field Measurements, Survey notes, Aerial engineering data, Computation sheets, agreement information, FFA coordination, Right-of-way certification and LD-33 County Engineer Approval Form.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper documents relevant design data project has been electronically archived into a document management system ; Electronic: digital files and final deliverables within a document management system
